title: Best App or Addon for quotes
excerpt:
HI there, loving Monday.com so far 
Is there away that when you create a quote that the amount is then added to the deal value? 
if not, what is the best solution for creating quote and deals maybe with an Addon?

posts.author: richardtknight (Richard Knight)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI there, loving Monday.com so far

posts.author: dale.fahrney (Dale Fahrney)
posts.cookedHtml: I have been using PandaDoc’s and it works pretty well. ~ Dale

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @richardtknight,

You can check out the Paysaro app in the marketplace. It allows you to select items right from your board into your quotes which you can then download

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. You should try GetSign monday addon for quotes, agreements, proposals and more. It’s the easiest and most affordable way to generate documents and collect legally binding signatures. GetSign is the first monday native CPQ - Configure, Price, Quote solution.
